name: French Honey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, honey, olive oil, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the bread flour, gluten, and yeast to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Place all ingredients into your bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions.
4. Bake the dough until it is golden brown and has a light, crispy crust.
5. Turn off the heat and let the bread cool slightly before slicing and serving.
This recipe yields a wonderful, slightly sweet French bread with a delightful, crisp exterior.
